message:
fix(mvcc): exhaustive match for FCW merge decisions + pager improvements

Refactors the first-committer-wins (FCW) conflict path from
if/else-if chains to an exhaustive match on MergeDecision. This:

1. Adds explicit handling for MergeDecision::IntentReplay, which was
   previously falling through to the rebase path. Intent replay
   requires structured page knowledge unavailable at the storage
   layer, so it now correctly aborts with a descriptive log message
   rather than silently attempting XOR merge on structured pages.

2. Makes the match exhaustive so future MergeDecision variants will
   produce a compile error rather than silently falling through.

Pager improvements in fsqlite-pager for complementary page-level
operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
